title: ShieldClaw: Security Skill Optimization with Schliff

key_issues: No eval-suite.json — 3 dimensions unmeasurable (triggers, quality, edges)
Low composability: 8/10 checks failed (no scope boundaries, no I/O contract, no handoffs)
Moderate efficiency: no imperative-voice lines, no WHY-reasoning, no bash code blocks

changes: Rewrote rules to start with imperative verbs (Treat, Guard, Flag, Detect, Identify, Verify)
Converted scanner usage to ```bash code block
Added concrete example with e.g. pattern
Added real example using e.g. pattern to fix no_real_examples issue
Added 'Scope & Integration' section with all 8 missing composability checks
Positive scope, negative scope, I/O contract, handoff points
Error behavior, idempotency, dependency declarations, version compat
Created eval-suite.json with 10 triggers, 6 test cases, 7 edge cases
All 4 assertion types covered (contains, pattern, excludes, format)

constraints_respected: SKILL.md remained under ~300 tokens (OpenClaw awareness layer budget)
All security rules preserved — no functional changes to detection behavior
No Claude-Code-specific patterns — fully OpenClaw compatible
